title: Random Quote Machine
desc: A modern random quote generator built with React. It displays inspirational quotes and allows users to generate new quotes instantly with a clean and responsive interface.

title: Markdown Previewer
desc: A real-time Markdown editor and previewer built with React. Users can write Markdown syntax and instantly see the rendered output.

title: JavaScript Calculator
desc: A fully functional calculator supporting basic arithmetic operations, decimals, and responsive design.

title: 25 + 5 Clock
desc: A Pomodoro productivity timer with customizable session and break lengths, built using React.

title: Drum Machine
desc: Interactive drum machine that plays sounds through keyboard keys and mouse clicks with responsive UI.

title: Blog Website
desc: Developed and customized a Blogger website with a responsive interface, fixed navigation bar, SEO enhancements, and optimized user experience across devices.
